Venom: Let There be Carnage (2021)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $213,550,366Details
International Box Office $287,996,556
Worldwide Box Office $501,546,922
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $15,192,762
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $24,452,320
Total $39,645,082
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Eddie Brock is still struggling to coexist with the shape-shifting extraterrestrial Venom. When deranged serial killer Cletus Kasady also becomes host to an alien symbiote, Brock and Venom must put aside their differences to stop his reign of terror.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$90,033,210 (42.2% of total gross)
Legs:2.37 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:42.6% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$110,000,000 (worldwide box office is 4.6 times production budget)
Theater counts:4,225 opening theaters/4,225 max. theaters, 7.9 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $251,099,064

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: October 1st, 2021 (Wide) by Sony Pictures
October 1st, 2021 (IMAX) by Sony Pictures
International Releases: September 30th, 2021 (Wide), released as Веном 2 (Russia (CIS))
October 7th, 2021 (Wide), released as Venom: Carnage liberado (Chile)
October 7th, 2021 (Wide), released as Venom: Carnage liberado (Mexico)
October 7th, 2021 (Wide), released as Venom: Tempo de Carnificina (Brazil)
October 7th, 2021 (Wide), released as Venom: Carnage liberado (Argentina)
Video Release: November 23rd, 2021 by Sony Pictures Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for intense sequences of violence and action, some strong language, disturbing material and suggestive references.
(Rating bulletin 2696 (cert #52628), 9/1/2021)
Running Time: 97 minutes
Franchise: Venom, Sony’s Marvel Universe
Geographical setting: San Francisco
Plot point: Anti Hero, Friendly Alien on Earth, Investigative Journalist, Prison Break, Serial Killer
Subgenre: Action Thriller
Time period setting: 1990s
Source:Spin-Off
Genre:Action
Production Method:Animation/Live Action
Creative Type:Super Hero
Production/Financing Companies: Marvel Studios, Columbia Pictures
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Eddie Brock is still struggling to coexist with the shape-shifting extraterrestrial Venom. When deranged serial killer Cletus Kasady also becomes host to an alien symbiote, Brock and Venom must put aside their differences to stop his reign of terror.
